features: SUPER FRESH: Experience instant, long-lasting freshness with Colgate Plax Cool Mint alcohol free* Mouthwash!
NO BURN SENSATION: Because this no alcohol* mouthwash is designed for a no burn sensation with 0% alcohol*, you’ll love the swishing that gives you 100% breathtaking freshness
PLAQUE PROTECTION: Colgate Plax provides 24/7** plaque protection, so you know you’re doing a great job looking after your teeth each time you rinse
CLINICALLY TESTED: The alcohol free mouthwash has been clinically tested by dentists
DISCLAIMERS: *Contains no ethyl alcohol. **Plaque bacteria, when used twice daily
description: Product Description Colgate Plax Cool Mint alcohol free* Mouthwash gives instant, long-lasting freshness. The non alcohol* mouthwash* fights plaque bacteria & is clinically tested by dentists. *Contains no ethyl alcohol. Directions Take a sip, swish around in the mouth, and spit out. Safety Warning Do not swallow, Avoid contact with eyes Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
